data.title: Jupiter Launches Solana Ecosystem Explorer
data.description:
Jupiter has announced the launch of a Solana ecosystem explorer on the X platform. According to Odaily, this new tool integrates data from Solscan and DefiLlama to create a comprehensive discovery layer for the entire Solana ecosystem. Users can now access a complete view of projects through a single interface.

The explorer provides insights into various aspects of projects, including financial details such as fees, revenue, and total value locked (TVL). It also offers information on social media presence, including tweets, followers, and updates. Additionally, the tool tracks user activity, covering transactions and growth, as well as details about products and tokens.

data.title: Ethereum Faces Potential Retest of $2,500 Level Amid Weakness
data.description: Crypto KOL Ted posted on X that Ethereum ($ETH) is exhibiting signs of weakness, suggesting a possible retest of the $2,500 level. If Ethereum fails to maintain this level, it could trigger a liquidation cascade.

data.title: Partial weekend U.S. government shutdown exposes pitfalls in prediction market contracts
data.description:
The delay has sparked concerns about how prediction market contracts on Polymarket and Kalshi define a government shutdown.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/u-s-government-shutdown-prediction-market/

data.title: Over $38 million in liquidations occurred across the entire network in the past hour, with $10.71 million in BTC liquidations.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $38.0805 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past hour, including $37.1939 million in long positions and $886,600 in short positions. In addition, approximately $10.71 million in Bitcoin positions were liquidated and approximately $10.23 million in Ethereum positions were liquidated.

data.title: Analysis: Warsh will not be influenced by the White House and will maintain a certain balance between the Fed's dual mandate.
data.description: Peter Cardillo, chief market strategist at Sparta Capital Securities, said, "I don't want to say that Warsh's nomination as the new Fed chairman was a complete surprise. He's always been considered hawkish, but recently he seems to be converging with Trump's position, making it a bit difficult to assess how the market will accept this nomination. We just need to see if he'll be influenced by the White House. My guess is that he won't; he'll examine issues very carefully and maintain a certain balance on inflation and the labor market. He may not be as decisive as Powell, but not by much." (Jinshi)

data.title: Jupiter's requirement to import mnemonic phrases to claim ASR rewards has sparked community opposition. It is expected that other wallets will be able to apply within 1-2 weeks.
data.description: SolanaFloor posted on the X platform that Jupiter's introduction of ASR rewards for Q4 stakers has sparked strong opposition from the community. The reward requires users to import their mnemonic phrase into their Jupiter wallet to claim it via mobile phone or computer. Some users have stated that forcing users to export their mnemonic phrase to claim the small reward is neither secure nor necessary, and it also excludes users using keyless or custodial wallets. In response to the criticism, Jupiter stated that it plans to enable the claiming function for other wallets within one to two weeks.

data.title: Robbery of 58 Million Yen Near Hong Kong Money Exchange Shop
data.description: A robbery involving 58 million yen took place near a money exchange shop in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong. According to NS3.AI, the suspects, two Japanese men who were employees of the shop, were apprehended at Hong Kong Airport. Police utilized surveillance footage to identify the individuals and quickly resolved the case.

data.title: Solana Co-Founder Discusses Potential Impact of Market Downturn
data.description: Solana's co-founder, Toly, has expressed his thoughts on the potential consequences of a market downturn. According to ChainCatcher, Toly suggests that if fortunate, a market crash on October 11 could initiate an 18-month bear market. He believes this period could be used to develop new innovations within the crypto sector.

data.title: Hong Kong police arrest two suspects in a 58 million yen money exchange robbery.
data.description: A robbery occurred yesterday near a money exchange shop on Des Voeux Road Central in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong, with 58 million yen stolen. Hong Kong police have announced the case has been solved. The two suspects, aged 27 and 51, are Japanese men who have been arrested at Hong Kong Airport. Both were employees of the Japanese money exchange shop. They were preparing to exchange 190 million yen (approximately HK$5.88 million) when one of them snatched the other's backpack (containing 58 million yen). Hong Kong police quickly identified the suspects using CCTV footage and successfully arrested the two Japanese men who carried out the robbery and acted as accomplices. (Hong Kong 01)

data.title: SoFi Technologies' earnings report: Q4 net revenue hit a record high of $1 billion, and the company launched its own stablecoin, SoFiUSD.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed fintech company SoFi Technologies (SOFI) released its latest financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025, revealing that adjusted net revenue surpassed $1 billion for the first time, reaching $1.013 billion, a 37% year-over-year increase and a record high. Furthermore, SoFi became the first company to offer cryptocurrency and blockchain products backed by the security and stability of nationally chartered banks, and launched its own stablecoin, SoFiUSD, on a permissionless public blockchain, extending its on-chain international remittance service to over 30 countries worldwide. (Businesswire)

data.title: Jupiter launches Solana ecosystem explorer
data.description: Jupiter announced the launch of the Solana Ecosystem Explorer on its X platform, integrating Solscan and DefiLlama data to build a discovery layer for the entire Solana ecosystem. It now allows any user to view a complete project overview in a single view, including project financials (fees, revenue, TVL); social media presence (tweets, followers, activity updates); user activity (transactions, growth); products; and tokens.

data.title: Xie Jiayin: Bitget has no cooperation with the "REB Community" or related platforms.
data.description: Xie Jiayin, Bitget's Chinese-language head, stated on the X platform that Bitget has no cooperation with the "REB Community" or related platforms. This is a typical scam using Bitget's partnership name for false advertising. Scams continue to emerge at the end of the year; please be vigilant to avoid being deceived and protect your assets from loss.

data.title: Metropolitan Capital Bank & Trust Closure Marks First U.S. Bank Failure of 2026
data.description: U.S. regulators have shut down Metropolitan Capital Bank & Trust in Illinois, marking the first bank failure of 2026. According to NS3.AI, the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) has taken on the role of receiver and has arranged for First Independence Bank to assume most of the bank's deposits. The closure is projected to cost the FDIC's Deposit Insurance Fund around $19.7 million.

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin options sentiment has turned bearish, and the market's expectation of a drop below the $80,000 mark has increased.
data.description: With continued outflows from Bitcoin ETFs, the Bitcoin options market is showing clear bearish signals, with the probability of BTC falling below $80,000 increasing. In the derivatives market, the Bitcoin options delta skew index rose to 17%, a new high in over a year, significantly higher than the typical 6% level in a neutral market, reflecting extreme risk aversion. Furthermore, total open interest in Bitcoin futures has fallen to $46 billion, a significant decrease from the $58 billion high three months ago, indicating that excessive leverage is being gradually cleared. Overall, the Bitcoin derivatives market sentiment is cautious. Analysts believe that whether Bitcoin can regain its position above $87,000 may depend on whether market risk appetite can recover after macroeconomic uncertainties ease. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Toly: The October 11th crash may trigger an 18-month bear market, presenting a "lucky opportunity" to develop new products.
data.description: Toly posted on the X platform that the 10.11 crash might trigger an 18-month bear market, a period that would allow us to focus on building (crypto) products using today's disruptive new tools. Earlier reports indicated that CZ unfollowed Solana co-founder Toly's X account this afternoon.

data.title: CZ: We have received positive feedback and feature suggestions regarding Binance Junior, emphasizing the product's positive impact in real-world scenarios.
data.description: Binance founder CZ stated on the X platform that he had just received "more constructive and positive" user feedback. The user pointed out that while Binance Square still has room for improvement, as a new feature, the current high-intensity use and stress testing will help it continue to be optimized. The user also highly praised Binance Junior, calling it a "great product and idea." Their child has been using the app for over a month and has not only had a good experience but has also seen positive impacts on real life, such as improved academic performance. The user suggested adding a "children's tasks" feature to Binance Junior in the future, such as completing schoolwork, tidying up the room, and maintaining good behavior, which parents could set and automatically unlock rewards upon completion, to enhance the product's real-world value and family involvement.
